Blood Alcohol Level 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a blood alcohol test? 
A blood alcohol test measures the amount of alcohol Â (also called ethanol) in a sample of your blood. Alcohol is the ingredient in beer, wine, and distilled spirits (liquor) that makes you feel intoxicated (drunk).
When you have an alcoholic drink, your digestive tract quickly absorbs the alcohol. It then enters your bloodstream and stays the
